# Origin Dev Labs
> Origin Dev Labs builds automation systems, intelligent agents, and custom software solutions that save businesses time and money. Based in Orlando, FL.

## About
Origin Dev Labs (ODL) is a technology company specializing in business automation. We build systems that handle repetitive work so teams can focus on what matters. Our approach is practical, results-driven, and systems-oriented — we don't build features, we build systems that work together.

## Services
- **Workflow Automation**: Connect existing tools and build automated workflows that handle repetitive tasks 24/7. Uses n8n, Zapier, Make, and custom APIs.
- **Intelligent Agents**: Autonomous agents that handle multi-step tasks, reason through problems, and integrate with existing tools. Built with LangChain, OpenAI, and custom LLM pipelines.
- **Smart Assistants**: Context-aware assistants that manage schedules, process documents, and handle communications. Built with OpenAI Assistants, custom NLP, and RAG pipelines.
- **Business Intelligence**: Custom dashboards and automated reports for real-time operational visibility. Uses Metabase, custom React dashboards, and PostgreSQL.
- **Custom Solutions**: Full-stack development when off-the-shelf tools don't fit. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, AWS/Vercel.
- **Web Development**: Custom websites and web applications with modern frameworks.
- **UI/UX Design**: Interfaces that are intuitive, beautiful, and built for conversion.
- **Digital Products**: From concept to launch — full software product development.

## Core Values
- Practical Over Theoretical: If a system needs a manual to operate, it's not finished yet.
- Results You Can Measure: Automation should pay for itself — in hours saved, errors avoided, or revenue gained.
- Systems Thinking: We don't build features. We build systems that work together.
- Honest Communication: We don't oversell. We tell you what's possible and deliver it.
